news.title: 1 person detained after gunfire interrupts fireworks celebration in Avondale Estates, police say
news.summary: Attendees at the celebration were evacuated out of an abundance of caution, according to police, and were quickly escorted from the stadium.

news.title: Metro Atlanta fireworks show evacuated after gunfire heard, 1 detained
news.summary: A fireworks show was disrupted Saturday night after gunfire was heard in the area, and one person was detained.

news.title: 1 detained after possible gunfire at Avondale Estates fireworks show
news.summary: A holiday fireworks show came to an abrupt end on Saturday night after reports of gunfire inside Cobb Stadium triggered an evacuation.

news.title: 5 protesters arrested during Atlanta's Peachtree Road Race
news.summary: A group of demonstrators protested on the Peachtree Road Race route Saturday morning, leading to multiple arrests by Atlanta police.

news.title: Convicted felon accused of firing gun during pawn shop robbery
news.summary: A man who has been convicted of crimes before faces federal charges in connection with claims he fired a gun during an Atlanta robbery.

news.title: 2 metro Atlanta men charged with trafficking meth
news.summary: Instead of towing a vehicle, authorities say a tow truck driver carried a load of drugs.

news.title: Police investigate SW Atlanta shooting that left 2 men injured
news.summary: Two men were taken to a nearby hospital after being shot in the legs in southwest Atlanta early Saturday morning.

news.title: 2 women injured in Atlanta shooting on Piedmont Avenue
news.summary: Two women were hospitalized following a shooting in downtown Atlanta.

news.title: 1 dead, 1 injured in shooting after Gainesville concert
news.summary: A Friday night shooting after a downtown holiday concert in Gainesville left one man dead and another person hospitalized.
